title: anci-oiv-resolver: Canonical Chilean Critical Infrastructure Operator (OIV) Registry Resolver
description: Canonical name-to-domain resolver for the 915 Chilean Operadores de Importancia Vital (OIV) designated by Resolución Exenta N° 87 of the Agencia Nacional de Ciberseguridad (ANCI · 16-dic-2025) under Ley 21.663 (Marco Nacional de Ciberseguridad). Provides verified RUT → canonical domain mapping with DNS verification, sector classification, and 987 indexed entries (915 universe + migration batch). Apache 2.0 license · npm published · enables reproducible passive OSINT research on Chilean critical infrastructure without false-positive vendor reports.

creators.name: Mellafe Zuvic, David
creators.affiliation: Independent Researcher · operating Reizan via AlmaAI SpA (RUT 78.387.715-5)

notes: Companion tool to research published at https://reizan.io/papers · operated by AlmaAI SpA · RUT 78.387.715-5
